basic_details.job_title: Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board Nagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 43 Bamboo Cluster Coordinator and Circle Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal (Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board), Nagpur has released the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 notification for Bamboo Cluster Coordinator and Circle Coordinator (Vanvrutt Coordinator) posts on a contractual honorarium basis. Candidates aged 18 to 45 years holding B.Sc Forestry / B.Sc Agriculture / BRTC qualification can apply by sending their application to the office or via email at [email protected] on or before 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Selected Bamboo Cluster Coordinators will receive a monthly honorarium of ₹25,000 (₹20,000 + ₹5,000 travel

application_fee.details: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 notification does not mention any application fee for either post. Candidates can submit their applications without payment of any fee.

Preference will be given to candidates who are local residents of the respective district. Computer knowledge is mandatory. | Age Limit: Minimum 18 years and maximum 45 years as on 02 July 2026 (candidates must not be above 45 years of age on 02 July 2026). | Educational Qualification: B.Sc Forestry / M.Sc Forestry / B.Sc Agriculture / M.Sc Agriculture or a retired gazetted officer from the Forest Department. Computer proficiency (MS-CIT, Word, Excel, PowerPoint and other online portal work) is preferred for this post. | Candidates wondering about age relaxation should note that no specific upper age relaxation details are mentioned for the Circle Coordinator post in the notification beyond the general eligibility; retired Forest Department gazetted officers are explicitly eligible to apply.

selection_process: The selection process for Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Bharti 2026 is straightforward. Applications will be screened based on eligibility
and shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.

Step 1: Submit application (offline/email) before 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Step 2: Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria. Step 3: Eligible candidates will be called for an interview (Mulaakhat) at the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal office
Nagpur. Step 4: Final selection on the basis of interview performance and document verification. Step 5: Appointment on contractual basis for 11 months.
The notification confirms that shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. No written examination is mentioned for either post.
how_to_apply: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 application process is offline — candidates must submit the prescribed application form in person or by email. Online portal-based applications are not available for this recruitment.
Download the official notification and application form (Prapatr) from the official email/notice board reference.
Fill in the application form completely — including full name, address, post applied for, educational qualification, Aadhaar number, mobile number, email ID, and work experience details.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents: degree/diploma certificate, Aadhaar card, MS-CIT certificate, and birth certificate.
For the Circle Coordinator post, also attach a one-page A4 note on your work experience.
Submit the completed application either: – In person / by post to: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Office, Katol Naka Chowk, Gorewada Road, Nagpur-13 – By email to: [email protected]
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.

content_sections.heading: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: The official Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 notification PDF has been released by the Managing Director, Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board, Nagpur. Candidates applying for the Bamboo Cluster Coordinator or Vanvrutt Coordinator (Circle Coordinator) posts are advised to read the full notification carefully before submitting their application, as it contains post-wise eligibility criteria, district-wise vacancies, and required document details. The official notification has been issued from the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal office (Phone: 0712-2970562, Email: [email protected] ). The Important Links table at the bottom of this article provides the contact details for further reference. Download Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Link

content_sections.heading: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Bharti 2026 – Quick Summary
content_sections.text: Here is a quick overview of the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Vacancy 2026 so candidates can check their eligibility before applying. Both posts are contractual in nature with an 11-month contract period.

rows.information: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal (Bamboo Development Board), Nagpur
Bamboo Cluster Coordinator, Circle Coordinator (Vanvrutt Coordinator)

content_sections.heading: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Important Dates
content_sections.text: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 notification was issued on 23 June 2026 by the Managing Director, Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board, Nagpur. Candidates interested in Bamboo Cluster Coordinator or Circle Coordinator posts must note the deadline carefully as applications received after the last date will not be considered. Eligible and interested candidates must submit their application either in person at the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal office, Katol Naka Chowk, Gorewada Road, Nagpur-13, or send it by email to [email protected] before the deadline. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details – Post-wise and District-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Vacancy 2026 covers two post types. The Bamboo Cluster Coordinator vacancies are district-wise at the taluka level, while Circle Coordinator vacancies are circle-wise covering multiple districts. All vacancy numbers are approximate and as mentioned in the official notification. The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of posts as per requirement.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria – Qualification and Age Limit
content_sections.text: The eligibility criteria for Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 differ for each post. All candidates must meet the qualification and age requirements as on 02 July 2026 to be considered eligible for the respective position. Educational Qualification: B.Sc Forestry / B.Sc Agriculture / Bamboo Technology diploma (BRTC). Preference will be given to candidates who are local residents of the respective district. Computer knowledge is mandatory. Age Limit: Minimum 18 years and maximum 45 years as on 02 July 2026 (candidates must not be above 45 years of age on 02 July 2026). Educational Qualification: B.Sc Forestry / M.Sc Forestry / B.Sc Agriculture / M.Sc Agriculture or a retired gazetted officer from the Forest Department. Computer proficiency (MS-CIT, Word, Excel, PowerPoint and other online portal work) is preferred for this post. Candidates wondering about age relaxation should note that no specific upper age relaxation details are mentioned for the Circle Coordinator post in the notification beyond the general eligibility; retired Forest Department gazetted officers are explicitly eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: Honorarium / Salary Details
content_sections.text: Both posts under the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 are contractual in nature and candidates will receive a monthly honorarium rather than a regular government salary. The honorarium includes a fixed amount plus a travel allowance component. The contract period for both posts is 11 months . No other allowances or benefits are mentioned in the notification beyond the honorarium and travel allowance stated above.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 notification does not mention any application fee for either post. Candidates can submit their applications without payment of any fee.

content_sections.heading: Nature of Work – Job Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Understanding the job profile before applying helps candidates assess whether the role suits their background and experience. The responsibilities differ by post level and are described in the official notification. Visiting farmers and motivating them for bamboo plantation. Evaluating bamboo plantations already undertaken by farmers. Planning plant supply, providing guidance, publicity, and promotion for bamboo cultivation. Updating information in the computer system at regular intervals. Coordinating with other departments for bamboo-related work. Working as per instructions given by the Managing Director, Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal. Mandatory to remain headquartered at the taluka or village level. Providing appropriate guidance to farmers regarding bamboo cultivation. Coordinating with other departments for bamboo-related work. Updating information in the computer system regularly. Evaluating bamboo plantations undertaken by farmers. Working as per instructions issued by the Managing Director, Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Bharti 2026 is straightforward. Applications will be screened based on eligibility, and shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Step 1: Submit application (offline/email) before 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Step 2: Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria. Step 3: Eligible candidates will be called for an interview (Mulaakhat) at the Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal office, Nagpur. Step 4: Final selection on the basis of interview performance and document verification. Step 5: Appointment on contractual basis for 11 months. The notification confirms that shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. No written examination is mentioned for either post.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents – Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Application 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must attach all required certificates along with their application form at the time of submission. Missing documents may result in rejection of the application at the screening stage. For Bamboo Cluster Coordinator: Degree / Diploma certificate (B.Sc Forestry / B.Sc Agriculture / BRTC) Aadhaar Card MS-CIT Certificate Birth Certificate (Janm Daakhla) Recent passport-size photograph For Circle Coordinator (as per the application form): Degree / Diploma certificate Aadhaar Card MS-CIT Certificate Birth Certificate (Janm Daakhla) One-page A4-size note on work experience Recent passport-size photograph Retired Forest Department gazetted officers applying for the Circle Coordinator post must mention their post name and year of retirement in the application form.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 application process is offline — candidates must submit the prescribed application form in person or by email. Online portal-based applications are not available for this recruitment. Download the official notification and application form (Prapatr) from the official email/notice board reference. Fill in the application form completely — including full name, address, post applied for, educational qualification, Aadhaar number, mobile number, email ID, and work experience details. Attach a recent passport-size photograph. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents: degree/diploma certificate, Aadhaar card, MS-CIT certificate, and birth certificate. For the Circle Coordinator post, also attach a one-page A4 note on your work experience. Submit the completed application either: – In person / by post to: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Office, Katol Naka Chowk, Gorewada Road, Nagpur-13 – By email to: [email protected] Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM .

content_sections.heading: Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Recruitment 2026 Apply Online / Application Submission
content_sections.text: This recruitment does not have an online application portal. Candidates wishing to apply for the Bamboo Cluster Coordinator or Circle Coordinator post under Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Bharti 2026 must submit their application by hand at the Nagpur office or send it via email to [email protected] . The last date for submission is 02 July 2026 by 5:00 PM . Applications received after this deadline will not be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – Maharashtra Bamboo Vikas Mandal Application 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their opportunity due to simple but avoidable mistakes during the application process. The following guidance is based on common errors seen in similar Maharashtra government contractual recruitments. Applying for a district where you are not a local resident: The notification explicitly gives preference to candidates who are local residents of the respective district for the Bamboo Cluster Coordinator post. Applying for a distant district may reduce your chances significantly. Missing the MS-CIT certificate: Computer knowledge is mandatory for Bamboo Cluster Coordinator and preferred for Circle Coordinator. Not attaching the MS-CIT certificate can result in rejection. Sending an incomplete application: The application form (Prapatr) has specific fields — including post applied for, Aadhaar number, and experience note. Leaving any mandatory field blank may cause your application to be rejected. Not attaching a passport-size photograph: The application form has a specific box for a passport-size photograph. Applications without a photograph are typically not considered. Sending the application after 5:00 PM on 02 July 2026: The notification specifically states the deadline as 5:00 PM. Applications arriving late — even by a few minutes — will not be accepted. Using an incorrect email address: Double-check before sending — the correct email is [email protected] . Emails sent to any other address will not reach the office. Not including work experience details: Circle Coordinator applicants must attach a one-page A4 note on their work experience. Skipping this document reduces the strength of your application.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board Nagpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board Nagpur Recruitment 2026 is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Bamboo Cluster Coordinator and Circle Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 43 vacancies, with 40 for Bamboo Cluster Coordinator and 3 for Circle Coordinator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Bamboo Cluster Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Bamboo Cluster Coordinator post is B.Sc Forestry, B.Sc Agriculture, or Bamboo Technology Diploma (BRTC).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Circle Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Circle Coordinator position is Rs. 40,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 18 years and 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Maharashtra Bamboo Development Board Nagpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application should be submitted in Offline mode.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages.
